tooltip.minecraft.diamond.0: wow a fancy <epic>Glowing wavy rainbow text</epic>
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.1: You can add <font value=norse>more lines</font> by just simply doing .1 .2 etc!
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.2: <gradient-30>You can define a gradient like this!</gradient-60>
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.3: The 30 and 60 refer to a scale from 00 to 99 for the hue.
tooltip.minecraft.diamond.5: You can make a 'line break' by just leaving the translation empty like this.
tooltip.namespace.path.7: skipping a number will stop the tooltip 'cycle', so don't do that. this text will never be rendered
tooltip.namespace.path.8: This works with any item or block, not just your mod or vanilla!
tooltip.always.namespace.path.0: This tooltip will always show, even without shift being pressed!
